title: unmount: fix error logic
body:
Only return `ErrCtrStateInvalid` errors when the mount counter is equal
to 1.  Also fix the "can't unmount [...] last mount[..]" error which
hasn't been returned when the error passed to `errors.Errorf()` is nil.

Fixes: #1695
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

@rhatdan PTAL. I noticed another error, namely that the error in https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/libpod/container_api.go#L471 is always nil as `errors.Wrapf(nil, ...)` is always nil.
